name: deez
description: Track habits with friends. Send vibes. Reach nirvana together.

scripts.ios: vite build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.android: vite build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.run:ios: vite build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap run ios
scripts.run:android: vite build && npx cap sync android && npx cap run android
